title: Cannot automatically connect bit based port to real

features.name: triand logic port connection to shortreal signal
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where a port declared as triand logic (bit-based type) is connected to a signal of shortreal (real/floating-point type)
features.snippet:
module a(input triand logic a1); endmodule
module b(input shortreal b1); a ex(.a1(b1)); endmodule

features.name: automatic port connection with bit-to-real type mismatch
features.description: Code should include an implicit port connection where a bit-based (logic) port type needs conversion from a real-valued signal
